result.stdout:
InfiniFrame.Pack
Usage:
  infiniframe-pack publish <project.csproj> [options]

Options:
  --rid <RID|auto>             Runtime identifier. Default: auto
  --configuration <Config>      Build configuration. Default: Release
  --framework <TFM>             Target framework. Default: first TFM in project
  --self-contained <true|false> Self-contained publish. Default: true
  --output <path>               Publish output directory
  --no-restore                  Skip restore
  --verbose                     Verbose publish output
  --force-clean-output          Allow deleting non-default output directories
